calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-27-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: L. Gillian # 12355.

Michael S. Rossoff, Esq. appeared for plaintiff(s) THE TIDES CENTER.
Plaintiff's Witness: Lois Butler was placed under oath and direct examined.

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s)THOMAS CHEN.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) THOMAS CEHN for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $ 843.63.
Prejudgment Interest - $
Attorney's Fees - $ 0.00.
Costs - $ WAIVED.
Total judgment in the amount of $ 843.63.
Property located at 2176 Missin Street, San Francisco, CA 94110 is forfeited.
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-27-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff The Tides Center is present. Represented by Lauren Hall.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Thomas Chen IS NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of DEC-27-2011 remains on calendar.
